case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ELMER CANCHE-YAM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHE-YAM, ELMER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELMER CANCHE-YAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANCHE-YAM, ELMER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHE-YAM, ELMER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
